reviews.comment:
Lugar muy lindo y habitaciones muy cómodas, para mejorar, comunicación, tenían el teléfono roto y no podía confirmar la reserva ya que venia en ruta, casi la pierdo, atención del desayuno excelente, playa de carga, muy buena atención a los socios

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place and very comfortable rooms. Areas for improvement include communication; their phone was broken and I couldn't confirm my reservation as I was on my way, I almost lost it. The breakfast service was excellent, the charging station was very good, and the customer service was very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdHBtaFJREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, paré varias veces allí como socio del ACA, y su encargada, Ana, me ha resuelto todo lo necesario en que a dicha oportunidad se diera...MUY RECOMENDABLE...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I stopped there several times as an ACA member, and the manager, Ana, has always helped me with everything I needed on that occasion... HIGHLY RECOMMENDED...

reviews.comment:
Muy buen hotel, impecable y excelente atención todo el tiempo tanto del señor del bar como de la señora encargada. Sin duda recomendaremos. ACA 10 puntos en todo

A very good hotel, spotless, and with excellent service throughout, both from the bartender and the lady in charge. We would definitely recommend it. 10 points for everything.
